name: ingestigate
description: Investigative intelligence for AI agents. Ingestigate handles what agents can't do alone: OCR, document parsing, entity extraction, and relationship graphing across 1,000+ file formats — PDFs, emails, scanned images, spreadsheets, chat logs, blockchain data, and more. The platform does the heavy lifting, then gives agents structured, evidence-backed access to 30+ entity types, connection paths between entities, and the source documents proving each link. Processing-aware responses prevent hallucination about incomplete data.
author: Ingestigate Inc.

INGESTIGATE_TOKEN.description: Short-lived access token for API authentication. Expires in 30 minutes.
